## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / palette mode
- [ ] Refactor / code quality
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test` passes (all existing tests green)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] New or modified palette logic includes a visual screenshot in this PR description
- [ ] Relevant tests added or updated

## Visual evidence (palette/algorithm changes only)

Include a screenshot of the 3D preview showing clean horizontal bands for the
affected palette mode, or explain why this change does not affect rendering output.
